subject: Your frustration is your fortune
snippet: Eelco de Boer story about solving your own problems. Dutch entrepreneur built PayPro (affiliate network) because one didn't exist for Dutch market. W.E.I.P.H. = What Else Is Possible Here?
structure: Personal name > Story setup > Third-party story > Lesson > Self-reflection > CTA to Titans Xcelerator > P.S. with additional value stack
key_techniques: P.S. as second pitch with different angle
